user.title: Connect to Checkmk
user.description: Enter the URL of your Checkmk site and the credentials of an automation user.

data_description.url: Base URL of the Checkmk site, including the site name path (no /check_mk/ suffix).
data_description.username: Name of a Checkmk user with an automation secret
data_description.password: The automation secret of that user

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Checkmk
reauth_confirm.description: The stored credentials are no longer valid. Enter them again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Checkmk site.

abort.already_configured: This Checkmk site is already configured.

data.create_metric_sensors: Create sensors for service performance metrics

acknowledge.name: Acknowledge problem
acknowledge.description: Acknowledges a host or service problem in Checkmk.

config_entry_id.name: Checkmk site
config_entry_id.description: Pick the Checkmk integration to send the request to (only required when more than one is configured).

host.name: Host
host.description: Name of the host as known to Checkmk.

service.name: Service
service.description: Service description. Leave empty to acknowledge the host itself.

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Comment shown to other Checkmk users.

sticky.name: Sticky
sticky.description: Keep the acknowledgement until the host or service recovers.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: Send a notification about the acknowledgement.

persistent.name: Persistent comment
persistent.description: Keep the comment even after the problem is resolved.

schedule_downtime.name: Schedule downtime
schedule_downtime.description: Schedules a fixed downtime for a host or some of its services.

config_entry_id.name: Checkmk site
config_entry_id.description: Pick the Checkmk integration to send the request to (only required when more than one is configured).

host.name: Host
host.description: Name of the host as known to Checkmk.

services.name: Services
services.description: List of service descriptions. Leave empty to schedule downtime for the entire host.

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Reason for the downtime, shown to other Checkmk users.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Length of the downtime in minutes. Used only when no end time is given.

reschedule_check.name: Reschedule check
reschedule_check.description: Triggers an immediate recheck for a host or one of its services.

config_entry_id.name: Checkmk site
config_entry_id.description: Pick the Checkmk integration to send the request to (only required when more than one is configured).

host.name: Host
host.description: Name of the host as known to Checkmk.

service.name: Service
service.description: Service description. Leave empty to recheck the host itself.
